---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- PAGE HERO -->
<section class="page-banner" style="color: white; padding: 3rem 2rem;">
  <div style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <h1 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;">Data Sources</h1>
    <p style="font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: 0.9; margin: 0;">Authoritative sources powering our health facilities database</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SOURCES GRID -->
<section style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 3rem auto; padding: 0 2rem;">
  <h2 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Primary Data Sources</h2>
  <p style="text-align: center; color: #666; margin-bottom: 2rem;">We collate facility data from multiple authoritative sources and validate against cross-references</p>

  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem;">

    <!-- DHIS2 -->
    <div class="card-modern" style="border-top: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227); display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
      <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.15) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 100%); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; border: 2px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.3); font-size: 2rem;">
          📊
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin-top: 0; text-align: center; color: var(--map-red, #c9a227);">DHIS2</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; flex: 1;">District Health Information System 2 (DHIS2) organization units across multiple countries. Captures health facility hierarchies and administrative structures.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Org Units</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">National</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Verified</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://dhis2.org" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary" style="text-align: center; text-decoration: none;">Visit Source</a>
    </div>

    <!-- WHO SARA -->
    <div class="card-modern" style="border-top: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227); display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
      <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.15) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 100%); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; border: 2px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.3); font-size: 2rem;">
          🏥
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin-top: 0; text-align: center; color: var(--map-red, #c9a227);">WHO SARA</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; flex: 1;">Service Availability and Readiness Assessment (SARA) surveys conducted by WHO. Provides facility-level service capabilities and infrastructure data.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Service Data</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Multi-Country</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Validated</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://www.who.int/data/sara" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary" style="text-align: center; text-decoration: none;">Visit Source</a>
    </div>

    <!-- National MoH Registries -->
    <div class="card-modern" style="border-top: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227); display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
      <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.15) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 100%); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; border: 2px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.3); font-size: 2rem;">
          📋
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin-top: 0; text-align: center; color: var(--map-red, #c9a227);">National Registries</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; flex: 1;">Master facility lists maintained by Ministries of Health across East Africa. Official authoritative source for facility licensing and accreditation.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Point Data</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Official</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Licensed</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://www.health.go.ke" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary" style="text-align: center; text-decoration: none;">Visit Source</a>
    </div>

    <!-- OpenStreetMap -->
    <div class="card-modern" style="border-top: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227); display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
      <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.15) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 100%); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; border: 2px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.3); font-size: 2rem;">
          🗺️
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin-top: 0; text-align: center; color: var(--map-red, #c9a227);">OpenStreetMap</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; flex: 1;">Community-contributed health facility data from OpenStreetMap. Used for cross-reference validation and coverage assessment in underreported regions.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Point Data</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Community</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">ODbL</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://openstreetmap.org" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary" style="text-align: center; text-decoration: none;">Visit Source</a>
    </div>

    <!-- Research Partners -->
    <div class="card-modern" style="border-top: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227); display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
      <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.15) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 100%); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; border: 2px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.3); font-size: 2rem;">
          🔬
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin-top: 0; text-align: center; color: var(--map-red, #c9a227);">Partner Datasets</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; flex: 1;">Data shared by research partners including KEMRI, universities, NGOs, and implementation organizations conducting health research across East Africa.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Research</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Contributed</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Validated</span>
      </div>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-secondary" style="text-align: center; text-decoration: none;">Request Access</a>
    </div>

    <!-- mSpray -->
    <div class="card-modern" style="border-top: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227); display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
      <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.15) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 100%); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; border: 2px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.3); font-size: 2rem;">
          💨
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin-top: 0; text-align: center; color: var(--map-red, #c9a227);">mSpray</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; flex: 1;">Indoor residual spraying (IRS) campaign data and facility contact points. Supports malaria vector control targeting and operational planning.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">IRS Data</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Operational</span>
        <span style="background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1); color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;">Shared</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://mspray.io" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary" style="text-align: center; text-decoration: none;">Visit Source</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- UPDATE FREQUENCY SECTION -->
<section style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 3rem auto; padding: 2rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.05) 0%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.02) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.2); border-radius: 10px;">
  <h3 style="color: var(--color-navy); margin-top: 0;">Data Update Frequency</h3>
  <p style="color: #666; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Our datasets follow a structured update schedule to ensure accuracy and timeliness:</p>
  <ul style="color: #666; line-height: 1.8;">
    <li><strong>Core Facility Lists:</strong> Updated quarterly or when new data sources become available</li>
    <li><strong>Service Availability:</strong> Updated annually based on WHO SARA and DHIS2 submissions</li>
    <li><strong>Coordinate Validation:</strong> Continuously verified against reference datasets</li>
    <li><strong>Quality Reports:</strong> Regenerated with each dataset version release</li>
  </ul>
</section>

<!-- METHODOLOGY SECTION -->
<section style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 3rem auto; padding: 0 2rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
  <h2>Data Harmonization Methodology</h2>
  <p style="color: #666; line-height: 1.8;">
    All source datasets are harmonized to a standard schema capturing: unique facility ID, official name, administrative hierarchy 
    (country/region/district), facility type (hospital/clinic/health center), ownership (public/private/NGO), GPS coordinates, 
    bed capacity, operational status, last verification date, and service availability indicators. Quality assessment includes 
    duplicate detection, coordinate validation, admin hierarchy consistency, and temporal completeness checks. Full documentation 
    is available in our <a href="source-code.html" style="color: var(--map-red, #c9a227); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;">GitHub repository</a>.
  </p>
  <div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
    <a href="source-code.html" class="btn-primary">View Full Methods & Code</a>
  </div>
</section>
```
